---
title: "Cluster Computing"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
execute:
  echo: false
  fig-width: 6
  fig-asp: 0.6
  out-width: "90%"
---



## Overview

In this, we will introduce methods for Cluster Computing.

```{r, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(microbenchmark)
```

::: {.panel-tabset .panel-pills}

### Slide Deck: Introduction to R packages

[![](./slides/topic_R_packages/preview_package.png){width=70%}](./slides/topic_R_packages/s_packages.pdf)

**Intro R packages**  
[Download slides (PDF)](./slides/topic_R_packages/s_packages.pdf)


***

:::
